testcase.name: Demo bookmark API error matrix > GET /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark > returns 200 with tenant-scoped bookmarks and request-id propagation
Demo bookmark API error matrix > GET /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark > returns 400 when request-id syntax is invalid
Demo bookmark API error matrix > GET /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark > returns 401 without a bearer token
Demo bookmark API error matrix > GET /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark > returns 403 when the principal lacks demo:bookmark:read
Demo bookmark API error matrix > POST /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark > returns 201 for a valid bookmark create
Demo bookmark API error matrix > POST /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark > returns 400 for malformed JSON
Demo bookmark API error matrix > POST /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark > returns 401 without a bearer token
Demo bookmark API error matrix > POST /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark > returns 403 when the principal lacks demo:bookmark:write
Demo bookmark API error matrix > GET /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark/:id > returns 200 for an existing bookmark
Demo bookmark API error matrix > GET /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark/:id > returns 401 without a bearer token
Demo bookmark API error matrix > GET /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark/:id > returns 403 when the principal lacks demo:bookmark:read
Demo bookmark API error matrix > GET /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark/:id > returns 404 for an unknown bookmark id
Demo bookmark API error matrix > PATCH /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark/:id > returns 200 for a valid bookmark update
Demo bookmark API error matrix > PATCH /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark/:id > returns 400 for malformed JSON
Demo bookmark API error matrix > PATCH /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark/:id > returns 401 without a bearer token
Demo bookmark API error matrix > PATCH /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark/:id > returns 403 when the principal lacks demo:bookmark:write
Demo bookmark API error matrix > PATCH /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark/:id > returns 404 for an unknown bookmark id
Demo bookmark API error matrix > DELETE /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark/:id > returns 200 for a valid bookmark delete
Demo bookmark API error matrix > DELETE /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark/:id > returns 401 without a bearer token
Demo bookmark API error matrix > DELETE /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark/:id > returns 403 when the principal lacks demo:bookmark:write
Demo bookmark API error matrix > DELETE /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark/:id > returns 404 for an unknown bookmark id
Demo bookmark API error matrix > GET /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark-tag > returns 200 with tenant-scoped tags
Demo bookmark API error matrix > GET /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark-tag > returns 401 without a bearer token
Demo bookmark API error matrix > GET /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark-tag > returns 403 when the principal lacks demo:bookmark:read
Demo bookmark API error matrix > POST /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark-tag > returns 201 for a valid tag create
Demo bookmark API error matrix > POST /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark-tag > returns 400 for malformed JSON
Demo bookmark API error matrix > POST /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark-tag > returns 401 without a bearer token
Demo bookmark API error matrix > POST /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark-tag > returns 403 when the principal lacks demo:bookmark:write
Demo bookmark API error matrix > POST /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark-tag > returns 404 for an unknown bookmark id
Demo bookmark API error matrix > DELETE /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark-tag/:bookmark_id/:tag > returns 200 for a valid tag delete
Demo bookmark API error matrix > DELETE /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark-tag/:bookmark_id/:tag > returns 401 without a bearer token
Demo bookmark API error matrix > DELETE /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark-tag/:bookmark_id/:tag > returns 403 when the principal lacks demo:bookmark:write
Demo bookmark API error matrix > DELETE /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark-tag/:bookmark_id/:tag > returns 404 for an unknown bookmark id
Demo bookmark API error matrix > DELETE /api/demo/bookmark/bookmark-tag/:bookmark_id/:tag > returns 404 for an unknown tag on an existing bookmark
